race.comment: BIG BOY BOWIE (1) enjoyed a nice trail behind the leading division then lengthened impressively to be beaten just over a length on debut last start over 1000m at The Heath. Beautifully placed back in a country maiden over an extra 200m. Should be breaking through. PREMIUM RETURN (6) closed in good style to finish seventh on debut last start over 1000m at The Heath. Suited by the small field and the step up in trip against an inferior field. Worth an each-way investment. PACKERS JOURNEY (11) has been up for a while but continues to race well. Wasn't far away last time out at Bendigo and from a better gate today she is worth considering. AND THERE YOU GO (14) is a debutante who has been well found in early markets. Plenty of jump-out experience and is from a family of winners. First starter THE MAD KING (13) hasn't shown all that much in two jump-outs but let the market do the talking.
